problem.title: Circular Linked List Creation and Traversal
problem.description:
Problem: Circular Linked List Creation and Traversal - Implement using linked list with dynamic memory allocation.

Input:
- First line: integer n
- Second line: n space-separated integers

Output:
- Print the circular linked list elements starting from head, space-separated

Example:
Input:
5
10 20 30 40 50

Output:
10 20 30 40 50

Explanation:
Last node's next points to head. Traverse from head until returning to head to avoid infinite loop.

solution.explanation: Create an array of node structs, link them in order, make the last node point to the first, then traverse until returning to head.
